title: Monster Armor applies Atk Hit AL SPD and attack dice bonuses

card.rawText: Atk: +3. Hit: +3. AL: +3. SPD: +3. Atk Dice Rolls: +1.

effect.value: Atk +3; Hit +3; AL +3; SPD +3; Atk Dice Rolls +1

plan.title: Monster Armor applies Atk Hit AL SPD and attack dice bonuses
plan.summary: Equip Monster Armor to a modifier-zero primary creature and verify its printed multi-stat suite.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so all bonuses come only from Monster Armor.

steps: Player 1 plays Monster Armor and equips it to their primary creature.
Read equipped creature effective AL, SPD, and attack dice.
Run a follow-up battle and inspect Hit and Atk output.

expectedAssertions.label: Attack damage includes the +3 Atk bonus

manualVerification: Confirm all printed bonuses apply only while Monster Armor remains equipped.
riskNotes: Attack damage includes the extra attack die path used by other stat-suite fixtures.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Monster Armor equipped stat suite.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
